summary: I've revised the requirements to iteration 3, addressing both findings from the requirements-completeness critic: (F1) removed the undefined "resume" language from R5/R26 (now R5/R27) and the assumptions — the assumptions now state explicitly that a menu action or Done are the only two ways out of the paused state, with no separate Resume control; (F2) added a new R12 specifying that a single-step re-run (Explore or Clarifying Questions) hides the paused menu and shows a live in-progress indicator while running, matching the existing "restart in progress" treatment already defined for Repeat from the Beginning. All 34 requirements were renumbered sequentially to accommodate the new R12, and the document's intro note now explains the iteration-3 changes.
